title: Microsoft and Xbox face criticism over profitability and consider restructuring
summary: Several reports indicate that Microsoft seeks to make the Xbox business sustainable, with possible restructuring as its own subsidiary.

title: Investor pressures FromSoftware for safe sequels and Miyazaki responds
summary: An investment fund seeks for FromSoftware to leave Bandai Namco and focus on safe sequels, while Miyazaki comments on the controversy at Kadokawa.

title: Sonic: difficulties with re-releases and lessons from The Backrooms
summary: Sonic developers discuss that they cannot re-release many old games and the success of The Backrooms as inspiration.

title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword reveals resolution and frame rate on Switch 2
summary: Capcom confirmed the technical specifications of the game on Nintendo's console.

title: Vanillaware needs publisher funding for PC ports
summary: The studio founder says that PC ports depend on publishers.

title: Body painting hide-and-seek game sells one million copies in four days
summary: The indie title has achieved great sales success.

title: Blizzard sues private WoW server for massive infringement
summary: Blizzard files a lawsuit against a private World of Warcraft server for intellectual property violation.

title: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 finishes development with major patch
summary: The game receives its final patch including community-requested features.

title: Forza Horizon 6 receives mandatory patch to prevent data loss
summary: Players must apply a patch to avoid losing their progress.

title: Nintendo's legal battle against Palworld weakens
summary: It is reported that Nintendo could only obtain minimal compensation if it wins the trial.

title: Capcom president explains the secret to its winning streak
summary: The president reveals the keys to the company's continued success.

title: Frontier files trademarks for Planet Resort and Planet Festival
summary: The company is developing a new Planet series game outside of zoos and parks.

title: Sony's retreat from PC also affects China
summary: Sony reduces its presence on PC and in the Chinese market.

title: Rockstar co-founder says open-world players don't need to finish stories
summary: The co-founder comments on player freedom in open-world games.

title: Spore developers admit excessive ambition in previews
summary: The creators acknowledge that previews generated unattainable expectations.

title: Fumito Ueda disappointed with what Sony did to Bluepoint
summary: The creator of The Last Guardian expresses sadness over the situation of Bluepoint Games.

title: Mobile studio seeks to stop 'EDGE' trademark troll
summary: A studio initiates legal action to stop the misuse of the Edge trademark by Tim Langdell.

title: X-Men '97 returns with season 2 and maintains its 100% on Rotten Tomatoes
summary: The animated superhero series continues with critical success.

title: Enginefall: the most innovative survival game in years combines Snowpiercer and Rust
summary: A preview highlights the unique mechanics of the survival game.

title: Former Bungie employee suggests buying the last Destiny game to save the studio
summary: After the end of Destiny 2, it is proposed that Bungie sells its last title to secure its future.
